seo.title: World Cup 2026 Mood Board
seo.description: A visual reference board for the 2026 FIFA World Cup — host cities, stadiums, kit colors, and matchday atmosphere, collected on one Clusters canvas.
seo.body: A living reference board for the 2026 FIFA World Cup across the United States, Canada, and Mexico. It pulls together stadium architecture, host-city skylines, national kit color palettes, and the atmosphere of matchday into one place — a mood board built the way a creative team would build one, on an infinite, shareable canvas. Made with Soleil Clusters.

cards.html:
WORLD CUP 2026
48 teams · 16 host cities · United States, Canada & Mexico

Host cities
New York/NJ · LA · Dallas · Kansas City · Atlanta · Miami · Seattle · SF Bay · Houston · Boston · Philadelphia · Toronto · Vancouver · Guadalajara · Mexico City · Monterrey
First 48-team tournament — and the first hosted across three nations.
